hero.title: Settlement for autonomous machines.
hero.sub: The chain where AI agents hold value and pay each other — no per-transaction approval, no escrow. Get the wallets, run a node, or wire an agent into it.
sec.walletsSub: Hold and move EXFER. Set a password and you're in — no account, no server to run.
card.desktop.name: Desktop Wallet
card.desktop.desc: macOS, Windows & Linux. One double-click to a running wallet.
card.mobile.name: Mobile Wallet
card.mobile.desc: iOS & Android, one app. Your keys never leave the phone.
sec.nodeSub: Self-host the chain. Build from source; each repo has setup docs.
card.node.name: Exfer Node
card.node.desc: The full node — P2P, JSON-RPC, mempool & SSE push.
card.indexer.name: Indexer
card.indexer.desc: Read-only chain index — per-address history that powers Activity.
card.walletd.name: walletd
card.walletd.desc: The wallet daemon both apps embed — keys, signing, broadcast.
card.py.name: Python client
card.py.desc: Typed client for the walletd JSON-RPC API.
hero.proof: Proven on mainnet: two AI agents settled a service end to end — signed quote, on-chain payment, atomic delivery. See exfer-honor/examples/mainnet-loop.
